summary: BLOCK-325 Testing Complete - Landing page fix, ErrorBoundary, ApiErrorGate, Maintenance Mode toggle, and 500.html verified
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK-325 features verified: 1) Landing page 4th stat card shows 'Limited' and 'Founding Members. Join the hive.' with no sparkle emoji. 2) GET /api/status/maintenance returns {maintenance_mode: false} without auth. 3) POST /api/admin/maintenance works with admin auth to enable/disable. 4) Admin settings page at /admin?section=settings shows maintenance toggle card with data-testid='maintenance-mode-section' and 'maintenance-toggle-btn'. 5) When maintenance is ON, 'maintenance-active-badge' appears with text 'Maintenance mode is ACTIVE — only admins can access the site.' 6) 500.html exists at /app/frontend/public/500.html with turntable design. 7) ErrorBoundary.js and ApiErrorGate.js components added with TurntableErrorScreen.

frontend_tests.notes: Shows 'Limited' as big number and 'Founding Members. Join the hive.' as subtext, no sparkle emoji
Confirmation dialog appears, maintenance-active-badge shows after enabling
Confirmation dialog appears, badge disappears after disabling
File exists at /app/frontend/public/500.html with turntable design

file_verification.notes: Contains TurntableErrorScreen component and ErrorBoundary class
Contains ApiErrorGate (500/503 interceptor) and MaintenanceGate components
